special_mechanics.name: Run Button
special_mechanics.description: Players can briefly dash toward the opponent. Character cannot run backward, only forwards. Running drains a corresponding Run meter.

special_mechanics.name: Chain Combos (Dial-a-Combos)
special_mechanics.description: Pre-programmed button sequences that cannot be interrupted once one hit connects. Some chain combos end with an uppercut or move that knocks opponent into air for juggle combos.

special_mechanics.name: Interactive Level Transitions via Uppercut
special_mechanics.description: Certain levels allow characters to uppercut each other through the ceiling, continuing battle in a different stage. Both normal uppercuts and uppercuts in ground combos trigger this. Whirl Wind Spin move also causes level change.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics description but no quantitative physics parameters. Fighting game mechanics documented but specific movement values, gravity constants, and sub-pixel system details not available in source material.
